issue_summary: Interval Added gap method that returns the gap between two intervals. Added abuts method that returns true if two intervals abut. DateTimeUtils Added getReadableInterval(ReadableInterval) method to handle null intervals
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Gets the interval where this interval and that specified overlap.
     * 
     * @param interval  the interval to examine, null means now
     * @return the overlap interval, null if no overlap
     * @since 1.1
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the overlap where this interval and that specified. *

* Any two intervals can overlap, abut, or have a gap between them. * This method returns the amount of the overlap, only if the * intervals do overlap. * If the intervals do not overlap, then null is returned. * * @param interval the interval to examine, null means now * @return the overlap interval, null if no overlap * @since 1.1 */
